209 F0800M_STF_MUSIC_CD F0800M_STF_MUSIC_CD F0800M Staff Assessment: Music Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers listening to music. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
210 F0800N_STF_ANML_CD F0800N_STF_ANML_CD F0800N Staff Assessment: Animal Presence Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers being around animals such as pets. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not
